data.title: Expert Melissa Barton from Robinson Well Co. in Monroe, GA, discusses signs of water well pump failure for reliable water supply.
data.description: In Monroe, Georgia, on January 26, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discusses the key indicators that suggest a water well pump may need replacement. Melissa Barton from Robinson Well Co. provides insights into spotting signs of pump failure and stresses the importance of timely pump replacement. The article sheds light on crucial signs homeowners should look out for to prevent further damage.

data.title: DHT Holdings stock's RS rating upgraded from 76 to 81 due to improving price performance.
data.description: DHT Holdings has displayed a positive trend in its stock performance, resulting in an increase in its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 76 to 81. This upgrade signifies an improvement in the company's stock compared to its peers.

data.title: Amer Sports stock's RS rating jumps to 83, indicating improved technical performance. Important for investors.
data.description: A recent upgrade in Relative Strength Rating indicates improving technical performance for Amer Sports. The stock's RS Rating has jumped to 83, reflecting positive momentum. This development suggests a growing strength in Amer Sports' stock performance.

data.title: VanEck launches VanEck Avalanche ETF (NASDAQ: VAVX) targeting institutional blockchain adoption with AVAX token.
data.description: On Monday, VanEck launched the VanEck Avalanche ETF (NASDAQ: VAVX), marking its entry into the digital assets market. This new fund, the first of its kind in the U.S., allows investors to track price movements and stake rewards of Avalanche's native token, AVAX. The ETF aims to offer a transparent and exchange-traded opportunity to engage with the Avalanche blockchain ecosystem. VanEck believes this move will facilitate institutional blockchain adoption, with Avalanche's architecture positioned as a bridge between traditional finance and digital assets. This development signifies VanEck's commitment to expanding its ETF offerings in the digital assets space.

data.title: Royce Micro-Cap Trust (NYSE: RMT) had an average trading volume of 429,716 shares as of Dec 31, 2025. NAV was 11.79, MKT at 10.43.
data.description: As of January 26, 2026, the average weekly trading volume reached around 429,716 shares. The fund's adviser boasts over five decades of expertise in small- and micro-cap investments. The closing prices as of December 31, 2025, stood at a Net Asset Value (NAV) of 11.79 and a Market Value (MKT) of 10.43. The average annual total return as of the same date was in the NAV format (%), indicating a significant performance metric for the fund.

data.title: Interplay in Seattle achieves rare SOC 2 Type II certification, highlighting commitment to secure IT services.
data.description: Seattle-based managed IT services provider Interplay has recently completed its SOC 2 Type II audit, earning certification for its security, availability, and confidentiality controls. This accomplishment sets Interplay apart in the Seattle market, showcasing its dedication to top-tier security and accountability standards. The audit is a significant achievement, particularly for a managed service provider, highlighting Interplay's commitment to excellence.

data.title: Insurance expert Doug Mercer advises new residents in Fenton to review their coverage to ensure policies follow them correctly.
data.description: In an article by HelloNation, it has been addressed how relocating to Fenton, Michigan, can impact auto insurance rates. Insights from Insurance Expert Doug shed light on this. It highlights the importance for new residents to take proactive steps to ensure their policies transition smoothly. The article delves into the implications of relocation on insurance premiums, offering crucial advice to individuals making the move. This guidance aims to assist newcomers in navigating the specifics of their auto insurance policies, safeguarding them from any potential disruptions or discrepancies.

data.title: Propane safety tips by Ken Young Jr. shared in HelloNation, emphasizing basic precautions for home and recreational use.
data.description: In Port Neches, Texas on January 26, 2026, HelloNation has outlined critical propane safety measures for both home usage and recreational endeavors. Emphasizing the significance of comprehending essential precautions, the article highlights the universal application of safety protocols, whether individuals are engaging in activities like grilling or utilizing propane for heating purposes.

data.title: Dealerware introduces new enterprise reporting suite to improve automotive retailers' performance management.
data.description: A cutting-edge enterprise reporting suite has been launched offering proactive alerts, intelligent reports, and visually engaging dashboards to enhance decision-making in automotive retail and network-level mobility operations. The suite was unveiled in AUSTIN, Texas on Jan. 26, 2026. Dealerware, a prominent fleet management company, introduced this innovative solution designed to revolutionize the industry. This suite is equipped with advanced features to provide timely insights and facilitate data-driven decisions.

data.title: Alternative Ballistics Corp reaches major milestone with stock symbol ALBC, now publicly quoted, Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: Today, in Las Vegas, NV, on Jan. 26, 2026, the public safety technology company, Alternative Ballistics Corporation (referred to as "Alternative Ballistics"), achieved a noteworthy accomplishment by having its shares traded under the symbol ALBC. This marks a significant milestone for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Ethereum forms team for post-quantum security amid rising concerns, transitioning from research to action - Justin Drake.
data.description: As per Ethereum researcher Justin Drake, the ecosystem is transitioning from research to implementation due to the looming threat posed by quantum computing.

data.title: Brice Bishop of Weatherhead and Sons highlights the importance of exterior checkups for Michigan homeowners due to unique weather challenges.
data.description: In Grand Rapids, Michigan on January 26, 2026, an expert from Weatherhead and Sons emphasized the significance of exterior checkups for homeowners in the state. According to Brice Bishop, Michigan residents face distinct challenges due to the weather conditions, including heavy snow and spring rains. The expert's insights were shared in a HelloNation feature. This information highlights the importance of regular maintenance to protect homes from potential damage caused by the state's weather conditions.

data.title: Nomad Temporary Housing welcomes back Michael James, a valued team member with experience and industry knowledge.
data.description: In San Diego on January 26, 2026, Nomad Temporary Housing shared their excitement over welcoming back Michael James to their team. Michael has rejoined Nomad, bringing extensive experience, strong industry expertise, and a successful history. His return is a significant addition for the organization.

data.title: DataSelf releases Analytics Plus™ for BI with AI, including data pipelines, modeling, and KPI intel. Jan. 26, 2026.
data.description: DataSelf Corp., a leading provider of BI-based analytics in the mid-market sector, unveiled DataSelf Analytics Plus™ - the industry's initial end-to-end BI solution incorporating AI-supported data pipelines, semantic modeling, and KPI intelligence on January 26, 2026, in San Jose, California.

data.title: Simplesat challenges Medallia & Qualtrics in high-volume feedback management for CX teams to streamline support workflow.
data.description: Simplesat is challenging industry giants Medallia and Qualtrics by emphasizing the importance of efficient feedback management for high-volume operations. Their platform is designed for rapid deployment, allowing customer experience teams to go live within days. Simplesat offers streamlined surveys for Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), Customer Effort Score (CES), Net Promoter Score (NPS), and 5-star ratings. Additionally, it ensures feedback integration directly into the support workflow, making the process seamless for businesses.

data.title: Pinnacle Financial Services introduces new agent website to enhance digital experience for independent agents nationally.
data.description: Pinnacle Financial Services has unveiled its revamped agent website, which boasts a modern and simplified design aimed at boosting efficiency and providing better access to resources for independent agents throughout the country. The digital platform caters to agents specializing in Medicare, health, life, annuities, and long-term care, and is set to benefit a large number of agents across the nation.

data.title: Tarter enhances leadership team for growth with new hires and investments in manufacturing, contributing to its 80-year legacy.
data.description: Tarter is ramping up its expansion efforts through significant executive appointments, a wider range of products, and calculated investments in American manufacturing and automation. Boasting over 80 years of experience in durable farm equipment, the company has bolstered its management team to effectively cater to retail and OEM sectors.

data.title: Stratevi appoints Lauren Elliott as Senior Principal for Market Access and introduces Access & Reimbursement Communications.
data.description: Stratevi is excited to announce the addition of Lauren Elliott as the new Senior Principal of Market Access. In addition, they are introducing a new Access & Reimbursement Communications capability, enhancing their recent integration into the Assembled Intelligence platform. This news comes from SANTA MONICA, Calif., on Jan. 26, 2026.
